_publications._publicationTitle: Perspectives of Patients and Providers on Chronic Pain Assessment in Neurofibromatosis Type 1 (NF1): A Qualitative Study.

_contextSnippet: six FGDs (n = 37) involving NF1 patients were conducted between September 2022 and June 2023...The 16 individual interviews with clinicians were conducted between February and May 2022
details: Platform used for conducting focus group discussions and individual interviews with NF1 patients and clinical providers
